source_pr.title: *: fix unstable test testSerialSuite.TestTemporaryTableNoNetwork
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #27435


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a goroutine/data-race issue in the test harness: it started a goroutine that referenced shared variables (e.g. `err`) and could still be running when the test returned. This PR stabilizes it by using a `WaitGroup` to wait for the goroutine to finish and by avoiding capturing/asserting the goroutine's `err` via shared variables, preventing data races under `-race`.
fix_pattern: Wait for background goroutines to finish (WaitGroup) and avoid sharing `err`/mutable state across goroutines in tests to prevent data races.
